scripts.auth:clear: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); try { fs.rmSync('playwright/.auth/storageState.json', {force: true}); console.log('✅ Auth cleared'); } catch(e) { console.log('No auth file found'); }"
scripts.auth:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); console.log(fs.existsSync('playwright/.auth/storageState.json') ? '✅ Auth exists' : '❌ No auth found')"
